items.title: Anthropic AI controversy raises cyber trust concerns
items.summary: Hidden tracking markers and a US standoff over a vulnerability-finding model are fuelling fears that AI now carries cyber and national security risks.

items.title: Anthropic widens Fable 5 safeguards & rates jailbreaks
items.summary: New safeguards will let Fable 5 block more harmful cyber prompts, as Anthropic also seeks a common scale for jailbreak risk.

items.title: Most firms hit by AI security incidents, study finds
items.summary: Most organisations are exposed to AI security breaches, with AvePoint finding 88.4% suffered at least one incident in the past year.

items.title: NVIDIA backs Verkada as AI security tie-up expands
items.summary: The investment could speed up AI search and incident review for schools, factories and retailers using Verkada's cloud security platform.

items.title: FBI Seizes NetNut Proxy Platform, Popa Botnet
items.summary: The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) said today it worked with industry partners to seize hundreds of domains associated with NetNut, a sprawling residential proxy service operated by the publicly-traded Israeli company Alarum Technologies [NASDAQ: ALAR]. items.title: Apple ‘Hide My Email’ Vulnerability Reveals Peoples’ Real Email Addresses
items.summary: ”Hide My Email users deserve to know that it may be possible for attackers to discover their hidden email addresses,” the person who reported the issue said.

items.title: Risky Business #844 -- China closes AI vulndev gap as USA lifts Fable ban
items.summary: On this week’s show Patrick Gray, Adam Boileau and James Wilson discuss the week’s cybersecurity news. items.title: SMS Sender ID Register goes live to help protect Australians from scams
items.summary: The Australian Communications and Media Authority (ACMA) says its new SMS Sender ID Register has commenced, in a move aimed at reducing text message impersonation scams by making it clearer [...]

items.title: County With 37 Data Centers Asks Schools to ‘Conserve Electricity’
items.summary: Henrico County is a major hub for data centers in Virginia. Its officials said it expects a 25% rise in electricity costs next year, and advised workers to close the blinds and turn off their computers to make up for it.

items.title: Scammers Sell Seeds for Exotic AI-Generated Flowers That Don’t Exist
items.summary: Ebay, Amazon, and Etsy are unable to stop the flood of AI-generated seed scams.

items.title: Companies Are Making Claude and Codex Talk Like Cavemen to Stop AI’s Soaring Costs
items.summary: A senior OpenAI employee has contributed code to the project, simply called 'caveman.'

items.title: Scattered Spider Hackers Plead Guilty on Day 1 of Trial
items.summary: Two men pleaded guilty in the United Kingdom this week to criminal charges stemming from an August 2024 cyberattack that crippled Transport for London, the entity responsible for the public transport network in the Greater London area.
